finalized_plan.description: Identify and retrieve reliable sources (e.g., from Wikipedia or official highway data) to determine the official mileage of I‑40 from Los Angeles to Cincinnati
Identify and retrieve reliable sources to determine the official mileage of I‑90 from Cincinnati to Augusta
Sum the two mileages to obtain the total distance of the trip
Round the total distance to the nearest 100 miles as directed
Calculate the total number of 12‑ounce water bottles used by applying the rate of 5 bottles per 100 miles based on the rounded mileage
Look up the dollar refund per 12‑ounce water bottle recycling value on Wikipedia (related to container deposit legislation or “bottle bill” information)
Multiply the number of recycled bottles by the refund value per bottle to compute the total dollar refund
Verify all intermediate steps and values to ensure accuracy
Provide the final computed refund amount in dollars

root_cause_reasoning: The agent did not use Google Search to confirm the exact mileage.
